case_title: JESSE C. RALPH VS. PACIFIC SALES KITCHEN AND BATH CENTERS, LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT PACIFIC SALES KITCHEN AND BATH CENTERS, LLC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-15-2017 - JUDGMENT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $600.00 FILED BY RALPH, JESSE C. AS TO DEFENDANT PACIFIC SALES KITCHEN AND BATH CENTERS, LLC BEST BUY ENTERPRISE SERVICES, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-15-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF NO INFO ON FEE FOR SERVICE SERVED DEC-27-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BEST BUY ENTERPRISE SERVICES, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF NO FEE FOR SERVICE GIVEN SERVED DEC-28-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PACIFIC SALES KITCHEN AND BATH CENTERS, LLC

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RALPH, JESSE C. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PACIFIC SALES KITCHEN AND BATH CENTERS, LLC BEST BUY ENTERPRISE SERVICES, INC. $600.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $630.00, DEFENDANTS SHALL RECEIVE A CREDIT AGAINST THE JUDGMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $600.00 AN AMOUNT THAT DEFENDANTS HAVE ALREADY PAID TO PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT BEST BUY ENTERPRISE SERVICES, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-15-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-15-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF JESS C. RALPH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS PACIFIC SALES KITCHEN AND BATH CENTERS, LLC AND BEST BUY ENTERPRISE SERVICES ARE PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY THOMAS FERRERO, RETAIL MANAGER. SERVICE WAIVED AS TO PACIFIC SALES KITCHEN AND BATH CENTERS, LLC. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
